name: Chocolate Chip Kiss Cookies
recipeIngredient: 9 oz Hershey's kisses or kisses-with Almonds milk chocolates
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 375°F. Remove wrappers from chocolate pieces.
In a large bowl, beat butter, granulated sugar, brown sugar, and vanilla until well blended. Add flour to butter mixture; blend until smooth. Stir in mini semi-sweet chocolate chips. Mold scant tablespoon of dough around each chocolate piece, covering completely. Shape into balls; place on ungreased cookie sheet. Bake 10 to 12 minutes or until set. Cool slightly; remove from cookie sheet to wire rack. Cool completely.
Prepare Chocolate Drizzle, if desired. Drizzle over each cookie. About 4 dozen cookies.
Chocolate Drizzle:
- In a small microwave-safe bowl, place 1/4 cup Hershey's Mini Chips and 1 teaspoon shortening. Microwave at HIGH (100%) for 30 seconds; stir. If necessary, microwave at HIGH an additional 20 seconds or until chocolate is melted and mixture is smooth when stirred.
